s3:x-amz-bucket-namespace.name: s3:x-amz-bucket-namespace
s3:x-amz-bucket-namespace.description: Filters access by general purpose bucket namespace type

s3:x-amz-content-sha256.name: s3:x-amz-content-sha256
s3:x-amz-content-sha256.description: Filters access by unsigned content in your bucket

s3:x-amz-copy-source.name: s3:x-amz-copy-source
s3:x-amz-copy-source.description: Filters access by copy source bucket, prefix, or object in the copy object requests

s3:x-amz-grant-full-control.name: s3:x-amz-grant-full-control
s3:x-amz-grant-full-control.description: Filters access by x-amz-grant-full-control (full control) header

s3:x-amz-grant-read.name: s3:x-amz-grant-read
s3:x-amz-grant-read.description: Filters access by x-amz-grant-read (read access) header

s3:x-amz-grant-read-acp.name: s3:x-amz-grant-read-acp
s3:x-amz-grant-read-acp.description: Filters access by the x-amz-grant-read-acp (read permissions for the ACL) header

s3:x-amz-grant-write.name: s3:x-amz-grant-write
s3:x-amz-grant-write.description: Filters access by the x-amz-grant-write (write access) header

s3:x-amz-grant-write-acp.name: s3:x-amz-grant-write-acp
s3:x-amz-grant-write-acp.description: Filters access by the x-amz-grant-write-acp (write permissions for the ACL) header

s3:x-amz-metadata-directive.name: s3:x-amz-metadata-directive
s3:x-amz-metadata-directive.description: Filters access by object metadata behavior (COPY or REPLACE) when objects are copied

s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption-aws-kms-.name: s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption-aws-kms-key-id
s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption-aws-kms-.description: Filters access by AWS KMS customer managed CMK for server-side encryption

s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption-customer.name: s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption-customer-algorithm
s3:x-amz-server-side-encryption-customer.description: Filters access by customer specified algorithm for server-side encryption

s3:x-amz-website-redirect-location.name: s3:x-amz-website-redirect-location
s3:x-amz-website-redirect-location.description: Filters access by a specific website redirect location for buckets that are configured as static websites
